description: Sleep Cycle develops sleep analysis technology, including mobile SDKs for real-time sleep tracking and a Cough Radar product for geospatial coughing analytics. Its public developer documentation is hosted at `sdk.sleepcycle.com`, and it also operates an MCP endpoint under `chatgpt.sleepcycle.com`.
summary: Sleep Cycle exposes a public MCP server at `https://chatgpt.sleepcycle.com/mcp` plus a documented Cough Radar REST API authenticated by an `API-Key` header; its mobile SDK docs also describe API-key-gated Android and iOS SDK integrations, but those are libraries rather than separate callable surfaces.
